name: active-flow push command appends a new flow record as a single NDJSON line
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-push.sh" --flow plan-feature --pid 1234 --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack)" = "1" ] && grep -q '"flow":"plan-feature"' .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack && echo ok 1>&2
